query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.consultorId, u.alunoId, u.loginMethod, u.isActive, c.name as consultorName, c.canLogin, c.loginId
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id
WHERE u.role = 'manager' AND u.consultorId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY u.name
LIMIT 30;
